```{=html}
<!-- when_any() - cleaner OR logic -->
<script>
window.WA_TITLE_PRE = 'filter(when_any(';
// Two conditions for when_any
window.WA_CONDS = [
  {
    label: 'Condition 1',
    text: '(species == "Adelie" & island == "Torgersen" & body_mass_g > 3700)',
    color: '#4a86c5'
  },
  {
    label: 'Condition 2',
    text: '(species == "Gentoo" & body_mass_g > 5000)',
    color: '#e8853a'
  }
];
window.WA_TITLE_POST = '))';
window.WA_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3250'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    'NA'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4500'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Dream',     '5700'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '4450'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Dream',     '5700'],
];
window.WA_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which condition
window.WA_MATCHES = [
  // Condition 1: Adelie from Torgersen with body_mass_g > 3700
  [true, true, false, false, false, false, false, false],
  // Condition 2: Gentoo with body_mass_g > 5000
  [false, false, false, false, false, true, false, true]
];
</script>
```

::: {.wa-stage-wrap}
<div id="wa-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .wa-frag id="wa-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .wa-frag id="wa-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .wa-frag id="wa-result"}
